studyName: Genomic Factors Involved in Chromosome Rearrangements

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes sequencing center, CNV region, average genome coverage, average CNV coverage, ploidy call for CNV region, body site were sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, and chromothripsis status.

variables.name: AVG_CNV_COVERAGE
variables.description: The mean, for the CNV region 2K windows, reported in the avgNormalizedCoverage data column from the sequencing center file, cnvDetailsDiploidBeta.tsv

variables.name: AVG_GENOME_COVERAGE
variables.description: The mean of all (genome-wide) 2K windows reported in the avgNormalizedCoverage data column from the sequencing center file, cnvDetailsDiploidBeta.tsv

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: CNV_REGION
variables.description: Genomic coordinates for region of copy number variation identified in the sequencing center file, cnvDetailsDiploidBeta.tsv, based on 2K window length

variables.name: PLOIDY_CALL
variables.description: Ploidy call for CNV region reported by sequencing center file, cnvDetailsDiploidBeta.tsv

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID from sequencing center

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: This subject consent data table includes subject IDs, consent group information, and subject's sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used by sequencing center

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes affection status. All subjects have chromosomal rearrangements.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject. All subjects have chromosomal rearrangements.
